🇮🇷 Ayatollah Ameli: "In history, three times women have taken the lead — surpassing the men." The first: at the burial of the martyrs of Karbala, when the men were afraid to step forward, the women came first. The second: in Kufa, when the captives were to be sent to Damascus, the women accompanied the caravan with dignity, led by Lady Zainab. "The third is in our time. The enemy is bewildered — a woman with bombs falling above her head, yet reciting epic poetry." He had just witnessed a mother who lost eight members of her family to martyrdom, still standing, still chanting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian MP, Hassan Gheshghavi, said the region’s future will be shaped by Iran through war and the strategic management of the Strait of Hormuz. He stated that Iran will exercise sovereignty over the strait and that the US and Israel lack the power to confront Iranian forces. He added that a new legal regime for Hormuz is being drafted by parliament based on the Supreme Leader’s guidance. @wfwitness
⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian state media released footage of Iranian security forces engaging the U.S. Helicopters over Central Iran yesterday. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Rosatom chief Likhachev said the events around the Bushehr nuclear plant are developing according to an undesirable forecast after U.S. / Israeli strikes today and that he is informing Russian President Putin. The strike hit the protection perimeter;…" ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Rosatom CEO Alexei Likhachev said Russian President Putin has been briefed on the situation at Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant following repeated US‑Israeli attacks. An attack occurred near the plant’s protective perimeter, killing one Iranian citizen. The main evacuation of 198 Russian employees has begun; they will travel overland to Yerevan and then fly to Moscow. @wfwitness
⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 One Palestinian was killed and several others were injured after an Israeli airstrike struck a vehicle near the entrance of the Al-Maghazi refugee camp in the Gaza Strip. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s Science Minister and the head of the Supreme Leader’s representative office at universities have joined the “Janfada” (self‑sacrifice) national campaign, launched in response to US‑Israeli threats against Iran’s coasts, islands and borders. The move follows attacks on scientific centres, including the killings of academics and more than 50 students. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 The World Health Organization’s regional director, Hanan Balkhy, expressed concern over attacks on Iran’s health infrastructure during US‑Israeli airstrikes. He noted that damage to the Delaram Sina psychiatric hospital and Tofigh Darou pharmaceutical facility has disrupted essential medicine production. She stressed that healthcare centres must be protected at all times under international humanitarian law. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 IRNA: Fires at several petrochemical companies in the Mahshahr special economic zone have been fully extinguished following a US‑Israeli attack around 10:45am on Sunday. The affected companies include Fajr 1 and 2, Karun, Razi and Bandar Imam. @wfwitness

🔥 BABYLON BURNING Most channels follow the slogans. We follow the balance sheet. Wars are sold as values. Then the oil spikes, the shipping lanes close, the contractors line up, and someone starts pricing “peace.” That’s where BABYLON BURNING begins. We track the machinery behind the headlines: who gains, who pays, who is repositioning, and who is dressing up profit as principle. Inside the channel: ➡️ sharp morning briefs on what moved overnight ➡️ market-aware war coverage: oil, shipping, sanctions, reconstruction ➡️ fast reads on Iran, Israel, Ukraine, Turkey, the U.S., the Gulf, Europe ➡️ quotes decoded as signals, not theater ➡️ analysis without flag-waving, wishful thinking, or ideological perfume This is not a channel for people looking for comfort. It is a channel for people who want the real architecture of events: money, leverage, logistics, power. No cheering sections. No sacred narratives. No optimism without evidence. 📌 Subscribe to BABYLON BURNING Facts. Money. The real picture. @BabylonBurning #ad

I totally support his ultimatum to the Iranian regime to open up the Strait of Hormuz and to do a peace deal. A massive military operation awaits Iran if they choose poorly. This regime has been severely crippled through Operation Epic Fury. Their reign of terror against the region and the world needs to come to an end, hopefully through a peace deal. After speaking with President Trump this morning, I am completely convinced that he will use overwhelming military force against the regime if they continue to impede the Strait of Hormuz and refuse a diplomatic solution to achieve our military objectives. If it’s not clear to Iran and others by now that President Trump means what he says then I don’t know when it will ever be. Choose wisely. - Lindsey Graham tweet

🇮🇷 🇮🇶 EXCLUSIVE: Khatam al-Anbia Central Headquarters spokesman Ibrahim Zolfaqari delivers a direct message to the Iraqi people: "The Iranian people were not alone. We were fighting the battle, and your hearts, your tears, and your firm stances were and remain with us." Zolfaqari announced that Strait of Hormuz restrictions DO NOT apply to Iraq. Iran calls on Iraq to seize a "historic opportunity" to end the American military presence on its territory and put an end to the plundering of Iraqi wealth by the United States. "The Iranian and Iraqi peoples stand in the same trench and will achieve, hand in hand, victory in this historic battle against the Great Satan, America and its agents — and against Israel, killer of children." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇯🇵 🇫🇷 Bloomberg: A total of 13 ships transited the strait since Friday morning, though volumes remain far below pre-war levels, when roughly a fifth of global oil and gas shipments passed through daily. Recent crossings included a French container ship and a Japanese-owned LNG tanker, suggesting limited confidence is returning, though it remains unclear whether access was secured through formal diplomacy or private negotiations. Despite the uptick, disruptions persist, with vessels often disabling tracking systems in high-risk areas, making real-time data less reliable. @wfwitness

🇺🇸 🇨🇳 Chinese holdings of US Treasury securities have fallen to their lowest level since the 2008 financial crisis, dropping from a peak of ~$1.3 trillion in 2011 to roughly $650 billion today. As the US wages war in the Middle East and escalates tensions with Beijing, China continues quietly offloading American debt. The trend has accelerated sharply since 2022. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 The IDF reports forces from the Givati Brigade have expanded ground operations in southern Lebanon, carrying out raids on sites used by Hezbollah and targeting militant infrastructure. Troops identified a Hezbollah-affiliated cell over the past 24 hours, which was subsequently struck by the air force in coordination with ground units. Israeli forces also reported seizing large quantities of weapons during raids on buildings described as military facilities, including anti-armour missiles, RPGs, rockets, rifles and ammunition. @wfwitness

🇦🇷 🇮🇱 BREAKING: Argentina's Plan Andinia Is No Longer a Theory, It's a Filed Government Document We covered this months ago when Patagonia was burning, now the documents are in black and white. A leaked Argentine government file (MS-26) reveals a "preventive plan" to receive up to 300,000 Israeli refugees — exclusively Israeli citizens, zero provision for Iranian or other civilian war victims. Separately, expediente AR-MOPU-ISR-0426-7781, filed March 8, 2026, proposes a private settlement in Patagonia called "Barrio Privado Josué, Profeta de Israel," 100,000 hectares of fire-scorched land. Four times the size of Gaza. Construction set to begin April 2026. Milei gutted fire management budgets by 81%, repealed post-fire land-use protections, and opened migration pacts for Israeli nationals, while fires cleared the very land now being developed. We said it then. The documents are saying it now. ➡️ Read our article we published back in January detailing the plan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Renowned Political Economist Prof. Carlos Lopes Africa is going to suffer quite a bit the first year & recover in the next. It was surpassing Asia in levels of growth in GDP before the war. That will be delayed now. The immediate impact will be supply due to our poor logistics. But the mega trends are in favor of Africa. Demographics & climate change are in our favor. Wealthy countries have accelerated aging but Africa happens to be the repository of young age. Intensity in technology & AI needs a market, which favors Africa. FULL INTERVIEW
